Pedastal: ^As the leader of the Mixtec Tribe it is now your responsibility to hold The Mushroom Ceremony.

^This is a great opportunity to gain respect from your followers.
^or every mistake you make you will lose respect from your people, so read the instructions carefully.
^It is important to know that the language of your people changes quickly so you might not understand some words in this book.
^hey are written in an unevolved version of this language and only one elderly lady from your tribe speaks it.
